LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TIM BROWN, 465 TEHAMA STC, LLC AND SAN FRANCISCO REAL PROPERTY HOLDINGS 9, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION, THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTERFERENCE WITH PROSPECTIVE ECONOMIC ADVANTAGE. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT PURPORTS TO ALLEGE FOUR CLAIMS LABELED FIRST, SECOND, FOURTH AND FIFTH. THERE IS NO CLAIM LABELED THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO THE FIRST CLAIM, THE DEMURRING DEFENDANTS WERE NOT PARTIES TO EITHER THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT AGREEMENT OR THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND THEREFORE CANNOT BE LIABLE FOR THE BREACH OF THOSE AGREEMENTS. THE FOURTH CLAIM FAILS BECAUSE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONTRACT BETWEEN RESMA AND SAN FRANCISCO REAL PROPERTY HOLDINGS 9, LLC. THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 465 TEHAMA, BUT WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF SEEKING A MOTION TO AMEND LATER IF FACTS CAN BE FOUND TO SUPPORT A CLAIM OF INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT. THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, BUT WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF SEEKING A MOTION TO AMEND LATER IF FACTS CAN BE FOUND TO SUPPORT A FRAUD CLAIM. DEFENDANTS SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Continued To May-25-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff SYDNEY JAY HALL, ESQ., Tel No. 650-342-1830 appearing in pro per;
Atty. MARK J. ROMEO, ESQ. of Law Offices of Mark J. Romeo, Esq., Tel No. 415-395-9315 appearing for Defendants Tim Brown, 465 Tehama STC, LLC, and San Francisco Real Property Holdings 9, LLC.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: As to DEFENDANTS TIM BROWN, 465 TEHAMA STC, LLC AND SAN FRANCISCO REAL PROPERTY HOLDINGS 9, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action for breach of contract cause of action, the fourth cause of action for interference with prospective economic advantage. The first amended complaint purports to allege four claims labeled first, second, fourth and fifth. There is no claim labeled third cause of action. As to the first claim, the demurring defendants were not parties to either the attorney-client agreement or the settlement agreement and therefore cannot be liable for the breach of those agreements. The fourth claim fails because plaintiff was not a party to the contract between Resma and San Francisco Real Property Holdings 9, LLC. The second cause of action is sustained without leave to amend as to 465 Tehama, but without prejudice to Plaintiff seeking a motion to amend later if facts can be found to support a claim of interference with contract. The fifth cause of action is sustained without leave to amend, but without prejudice to Plaintiff seeking a motion to amend later if facts can be found to support a fraud claim. Defendants shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
